title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability
description: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Learners cumulatively produce a risk-based lint policy and fixtures through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
